description_long: This is a robust, masculine wristwatch with a large, round black case and a thick bezel featuring angular, industrial-style lugs. The dial is dark with bold, high-contrast hour markers and hands, including a prominent red second hand and subdials, suggesting a chronograph function. The watch has three pushers on the right side, two of which are accented with red rings, adding a sporty touch. The case appears to be made of matte black metal or coated stainless steel, giving it a rugged, tactical appearance. The watch face is protected by a slightly recessed crystal, and the overall design is utilitarian with a focus on durability and functionality. No strap is attached in the images, but the lugs are ready for a band attachment.
description: A rugged, black chronograph wristwatch with bold markers, red-accented pushers, and a robust, industrial case design. The dial is dark and detailed, emphasizing durability and sportiness.
description_view_0: The watch is seen from a low front angle, highlighting the thick bezel, angular lugs, and the main crown with a red accent on the right side.
description_view_1: This rear-side view shows all three pushers, two with red rings, and emphasizes the watch's thickness and the industrial design of the lugs.
description_view_2: A side view focusing on the main crown and a single red-accented pusher, with the dial and lugs partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the watch, showing the lugs and case profile without any visible crowns or pushers.
attribute_brand_logo: A subtle logo is visible on the upper right quadrant of the dial, likely text-based, blending with the dark background.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is complex and sporty, featuring bold white indices, subdials for chronograph functions, and a red second hand. The markers are a mix of thick indices and numerals, with a multi-layered look and possible luminous elements. The style is chronograph with a utilitarian, tactical feel.
attribute_strap_type: No strap is attached; lugs are present for a standard two-piece strap, likely compatible with rubber, leather, or metal bands.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, red second) and multiple subdials for chronograph functions. The face is detailed, with high-contrast markers and possible luminous features.
